rules.title: Medusa
rules.tagline: Look up… and avoid eye contact

steps.title: Everyone looks down
steps.desc: The active player says "Look down!" and the group obeys with eyes closed.

steps.title: 3… 2… 1… MEDUSA!
steps.desc: On the signal, everyone lifts their head and stares at another player.

steps.title: Eye contact = penalty
steps.descDrink: If two players look each other in the eyes: 1 sip each.
steps.descSober: If two players look each other in the eyes: 1 point each.

steps.title: No contact = safe
steps.desc: If no one stares back at you, you survive. Next player, your turn.

ready.title:
Everyone
ready?
ready.instruction: Place the phone in the middle and:

report.title:
Who made
eye contact?
report.sub: Tap two players who locked eyes.
report.selectHint: Tap the player who locked eyes with {{name}}
